name: CC1101 Low-Power Sub-1 GHz RF Transceiver
description: The **CC1101** component provides a driver for the **Texas Instruments CC1101** Sub-1 GHz RF Transceiver ([datasheet](https://www.ti.com/lit/ds/symlink/cc1101.pdf)). The CC1101 is a low-cost, low-power radio chip commonly used for wireless communication in the 300-928 MHz frequency bands, including the popular 315 MHz, 433 MHz, 868 MHz, and 915 MHz ISM bands.

config_entries.label: CS Pin
config_entries.description: The SPI Chip Select (CSN) pin connected to the module.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Gdo0 Pin
config_entries.description: The GDO0 pin. Required when `packet_mode` is enabled, also used for single pin mode switching.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Carrier Sense Above Threshold
config_entries.description: Only accept packets when carrier sense indicates a signal is present. Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Carrier Sense Abs Thr
config_entries.description: Absolute RSSI threshold for carrier sense. The radio considers a carrier present when RSSI exceeds this level. Range: `-8` to `7`.

config_entries.label: Carrier Sense Rel Thr
config_entries.description: Relative RSSI threshold for carrier sense, compared to the current noise floor. Options: `Default`, `+6dB`, `+10dB`, `+14dB`.

config_entries.label: Channel
config_entries.description: Channel number (added to base frequency). Defaults to `0`.

config_entries.label: Channel Spacing
config_entries.description: Spacing between channels. Range: `25kHz` to `405kHz`. Defaults to `200kHz`.

config_entries.label: CRC Enable
config_entries.description: Enable CRC-16 calculation and checking. The CC1101 uses CRC-16-IBM (polynomial 0x8005). Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: DC Blocking Filter
config_entries.description: Enable the digital DC blocking filter. Defaults to `true`.

config_entries.label: Filter Bandwidth
config_entries.description: The receive filter bandwidth. Range: `58kHz` to `812kHz`. Defaults to `203kHz`.

config_entries.label: Filter Length Ask OOK
config_entries.description: Averaging length for AGC in ASK/OOK modes. Longer values provide more stable gain but slower response. Options: `4dB`, `8dB`, `12dB`, `16dB`.

config_entries.label: Filter Length FSK MSK
config_entries.description: Averaging length for AGC in FSK/MSK modes. Longer values provide more stable gain but slower response. Options: `8`, `16`, `32`, `64`.

config_entries.label: Freeze
config_entries.description: Controls when AGC gain is frozen (held constant). Options: `Default`, `On Sync`, `Analog Only`, `Analog And Digital`.

config_entries.label: Frequency
config_entries.description: The operating frequency. Range: `300MHz` to `928MHz`. Defaults to `433.92MHz`.

config_entries.label: FSK Deviation
config_entries.description: Frequency deviation for FSK/GFSK modulation. Range: `1.5kHz` to `381kHz`.

config_entries.label: Hyst Level
config_entries.description: Hysteresis level to prevent gain oscillation on borderline signals. Options: `None`, `Low`, `Medium`, `High`.

config_entries.label: If Frequency
config_entries.description: Intermediate Frequency. Range: `25kHz` to `788kHz`. Defaults to `153kHz`.

config_entries.label: LNA Priority
config_entries.description: If true, reduce LNA gain before DVGA gain when decreasing overall gain. Useful for optimizing noise figure. Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Magn Target
config_entries.description: Target signal amplitude for the AGC loop. Higher values increase sensitivity but may cause clipping on strong signals. Range: `24dB` to `42dB` in increments of 3 (e.g., `33dB`). Defaults to `42dB`.

config_entries.label: Manchester
config_entries.description: Enable Manchester encoding. Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Max Dvga Gain
config_entries.description: Limits the maximum DVGA (Digital Variable Gain Amplifier) gain. Options: `Default`, `-1`, `-2`, `-3`. Defaults to `-3`.

config_entries.label: Max LNA Gain
config_entries.description: Limits the maximum LNA (Low Noise Amplifier) gain. Use to prevent saturation in high-signal environments. Defaults to `Default`. Options: `Default`, `2.6dB`, `6.1dB`, `7.4dB`, `9.2dB`, `11.5dB`, `14.6dB`, `17.1dB`.

config_entries.label: Modulation Type
config_entries.description: The modulation format. Options: `ASK/OOK` (default), `2-FSK`, `4-FSK`, `GFSK`, `MSK`.

config_entries.label: MSK Deviation
config_entries.description: Deviation index for MSK modulation. Range: `1` to `8`.

config_entries.label: Num Preamble
config_entries.description: Number of preamble bytes to transmit. Range: `0` to `7` (maps to 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 12, 16, 24 bytes). Defaults to `2` (4 bytes).

config_entries.label: Output Power
config_entries.description: The transmission power in dBm. Range: `-30` to `11`. Defaults to `10`.

config_entries.label: Packet Length
config_entries.description: Packet length in bytes. Set to `0` for variable length packets (length byte prepended to data). Range: `0` to `64`. Defaults to `0`.

config_entries.label: Packet Mode
config_entries.description: Enable FIFO packet mode. When enabled, `gdo0_pin` is required. Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: RX Attenuation
config_entries.description: Internal RX attenuation. Options: `0dB`, `6dB`, `12dB`, `18dB`. Defaults to `0dB`.

config_entries.label: Symbol Rate
config_entries.description: The symbol rate in Baud. Range: `600` to `500000`. Defaults to `5000`.

config_entries.label: Sync0
config_entries.description: Lower sync word byte. Defaults to `0x91`.

config_entries.label: Sync1
config_entries.description: Upper sync word byte. Defaults to `0xD3`.

config_entries.label: Sync Mode
config_entries.description: Sync word detection mode. Options: `None`, `15/16`, `16/16`, `30/32`. Defaults to `16/16`.

config_entries.label: Wait Time
config_entries.description: Time to wait after a gain change before allowing another adjustment. Options: `8`, `16`, `24`, `32`. Defaults to `32`.

config_entries.label: Whitening
config_entries.description: Enable data whitening to improve DC balance. Defaults to `false`.
